description_long: This house is a medium-sized residential building surrounded by dense, leafy trees that partially obscure its structure from most angles. The main building features a simple, rectangular form with a moderately pitched gable roof, likely constructed from dark shingles. The exterior walls appear to be light-colored, possibly stucco or painted siding, with several windows distributed across the visible facades. A driveway or pathway leads up to the house, suggesting a main entrance at the front, which is slightly recessed and framed by the surrounding foliage. The landscaping is mature, with trees forming a natural barrier around the property, providing privacy and shade. The overall design is practical and unadorned, fitting well within a suburban or neighborhood context.
description: A light-colored, gable-roofed house surrounded by dense trees, with a driveway leading to a recessed main entrance. The structure is simple and practical, blending into a suburban landscape.
description_view_0: The house is mostly visible from the front, with the main entrance and driveway partially framed by thick trees.
description_view_1: This angled view shows the side of the house, with the roof and more of the tree coverage obscuring the structure.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible, heavily shielded by trees, with only the roof and a small section of the back wall exposed.
description_view_3: A side-rear perspective reveals the driveway curving around the house, with the roof and tree canopy dominating the view.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small porch, accessed by a driveway, partially obscured by trees.
